15. The joint committee also collected water samples from the sugar mill 
drain. The findings of the joint committee qua the samples collected 
from the sugar mill drain reads as under:
24. The team has also collected water samples from Sugar 
mill drain (name of the drain is Sugar mill drain), river Kali 
East i.e. upstream and downstream of the Sugar mill drain 
& Canal near sugar mill (Lat-29.269901, Long-77.743243).
